zh.lifeSummary: Anne Coles是Richard Coles的女兒，於大約1450年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾普雷斯頓 卡培斯。她於大約1477年與Richard Pargiter在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1564年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年115歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anne Coles是Richard Coles的女儿，于大约1450年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾普雷斯頓 卡培斯。她于大约1477年与Richard Pargiter在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1564年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年115岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): variant of Cole , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Cole
meanings: English: usually from the Middle English and Old French personal name Col(e), Coll(e), Coul(e), a pet form of Nicol (see Nichol and Nicholas ), a common personal name from the mid 13th century onward. English families with this name migrated to Scotland and to Ulster (especially Fermanagh).

English: occasionally perhaps from a different (early) Middle English personal name Col, of native English or Scandinavian origin. Old English Cola was originally a nickname from Old English col ‘coal’ in the sense ‘coal-black (of hair), swarthy’ and is the probable source of most of the examples in Domesday Book. In the northern and eastern counties of England settled by Vikings in the 10th and 11th centuries, alternative sources are Old Norse Kolr and Koli (either from a nickname ‘the swarthy one’ or a short form of names in Kol-), and Old Norse Kollr (from a nickname, perhaps ‘the bald one’).
English: nickname for someone with swarthy skin or black hair, from Middle English col, coul(e) ‘charcoal, coal’ (Old English col).

variants.name: Collis
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Collins  .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Anne Coles was born about 1450, in Preston Capes, Northamptonshire, England as the daughter of Richard Coles. She married Richard Pargiter about 1477, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1564, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 115.

fr.lifeSummary: Anne Coles est née environ 1450, à Preston Capes, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fille de Richard Coles. Elle a épousé Richard Pargiter environ 1477, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1564, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 115 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Anne Coles wurde um 1450 in Preston Capes, Northamptonshire, England, als Tochter von Richard Coles geboren. Sie hat um 1477 in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Pargiter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1564 im Alter von 115 Jahren in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Anne Coles è nata il circa 1450 nel Preston Capes, Northamptonshire, England come figlia di Richard Coles. Lei sposato Richard Pargiter circa 1477, nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1564, nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 115 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Colesは約1450年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプレストン カペスでRichard Colesの娘として生まれた。約1477年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンでRichard Pargiterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1564年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで115歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Coles(은)는 대략 1450년 영국 노르섬프토실르 플레스턴 캡스에서 Richard Coles의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 Richard Pargiter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1564년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 115세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anne Coles nasceu aproximadamente 1450, em Preston Capes, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filha de Richard Coles. Ela casou-se com Richard Pargiter aproximadamente 1477, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1564, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 115 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Anne Coles родилась около 1450 г. в местности престон капесь, нортамптоншир, Англия. Её отца звали Richard Coles. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Pargiter около 1477 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1564 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 115 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Anne Coles nació aproximadamente 1450, en Preston Capes, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra como hija de Richard Coles. Se casó con Richard Pargiter aproximadamente 1477, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1564, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 115 años.
